items.title: Australians continue to transit through Middle East despite 'do not travel' warnings

items.title: Weddings cancelled after road to Mount Wilson in the Blue Mountains fails

items.title: Carlton's poor second halves are the talk of the AFL, so what is going wrong for the Blues?

items.title: Still no trial date for Shyanne-Lee Tatnell accused killer Christopher Mark Jordan
items.summary: The man accused of murdering Tasmanian teenager Shyanne-Lee Tatnell remains without a trial date, almost three years since he was charged.

items.title: Preliminary cause of Normanton plane crash that killed a 32-year-old pilot released by ATSB
items.summary: The cause of a plane crash in the Gulf of Carpentaria earlier this year was due to the pilot, found dead in a crocodile infested floodwaters, hitting a tree.

items.title: States and territories agree to further fuel excise cut, using extra GST revenue
items.summary: Premiers and chief ministers agree to use an estimated $400 million in extra GST revenue to fund a 5.7 per litre cut to the fuel excise, on top of the Commonwealth's 26.3 cent per litre relief.

items.summary: Australia will join a virtual meeting of 35 countries to discuss plans to reopen and secure the Strait of Hormuz, and ease the oil shock rocking global markets.

items.title: Wiseman's Cottage, Rockhampton's oldest heritage property, is on the market

items.title: More SA general practices charging extra administration fees to cover payroll tax
items.summary: Patients are being asked to make an additional, separate transaction at general practices across Adelaide of between $5 and $10 to cover increased operating costs following the implementation of payroll tax for contracted doctors in 2024.

items.title: Powerful magnitude-7.4 earthquake strikes Indonesia, tsunami warning issued
items.summary: The quake, which hit early today, had a depth of 35 kilometres and its epicentre was 127km west-north-west of Ternate, Indonesia, the US Geological Survey said.

items.title: Crypto exchange platform markets in Australia despite ASIC intervention

items.title: Relocating tiger sharks may reduce short-term risk of shark bites, research suggests
items.summary: A new study analysing the behaviour of tiger sharks relocated from the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park under the Queensland Shark Control Program shows tiger sharks relocated from swimming beaches generally return to a beach within about three months.

items.title: Super Mario Galaxy Movie review: The only way out is through
